description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a fenced rectangular yard, featuring a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The house has a flat roof with a prominent glass atrium or sunroom structure on the upper level, and a large satellite dish is mounted on the roof. The front yard is landscaped with manicured bushes, trees, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is slightly recessed and flanked by tall, narrow shrubs. Windows are arranged in horizontal rows, with a balcony visible on the upper floor and a patio area at the rear. The property includes a spacious lawn and a driveway with additional greenery, giving it a suburban residential feel.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, glass atrium, landscaped front yard, and fenced lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, and tall shrubs lining the walkway.
description_view_1: Direct front-on view highlighting the entry path, balcony, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, glass atrium, and expansive fenced lawn.
description_view_3: Side view with driveway, additional greenery, and a clear look at the glass atrium and roof features.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with steps, flanked by tall shrubs and a paved walkway, no porch or columns.
